text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I can't stay like this forever! I have to do
something, or else nothing will ever change!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: ...But how do I begin?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, with a greeting, of course. "Hey there, Trainer
<username>. Nice job out—"

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Yes, like that. And next, I should—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?!
Trainer <username>?!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: A-actually... Well, I was just wondering...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
W-would you happen to have any interest in
karaoke, perchance?!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um... In that case, would you care to join me
now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her suggestion is a bit sudden, but I agree to go
to karaoke with Trainer Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Well... we're here.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: N-not really...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... I can't even remember how many years
it's been since the last time I went.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It was probably... when I was still in preschool,
maybe?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I've entirely forgotten how this works. Do we have
to call the staff to request songs using this
phone?
choice_data_list: Actually, you use the tablet over there...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Sorry for inviting you out like this so suddenly!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: A-actually...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Oh, there you are. Hey, Meek—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What?! You don't hang out with your trainer,
Meek?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Not really.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's wild. My trainer and I go to the arcade
together all the time on my days off!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
My trainer likes playing video games. She's sooo
good at them. She's even helped me get better!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? That sounds fun...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm embarrassed to say this, but... I don't have any
hobbies.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy reading trainer textbooks, adjusting
training regimens, and analyzing data. But those
things don't count as hobbies...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: So there's nothing I can do for fun with Meek!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want her to always be bored because
of that!
choice_data_list:
So that's why you came up with the idea for
karaoke?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I remembered my mom taking me when I
was very young.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That was the last time I went, but I thought if I
started going more, I could call it a hobby!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I never seem to do anything but study... It's how I
spent my whole student life, and even now, I...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I don't know why I'm like this...
choice_data_list: A-anyway, why don't we start singing?!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah... R-right, we should get started!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: If it's okay with you, I'll go first!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Twinkle, twinkle, little star! ♪ How I wonder what
you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kiryuin may only know children's songs, but her
voice is undeniably a thing of beauty.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough... Oh my, I think I might be losing my voice from all that singing. Haha...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much for accompanying me today!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Really?! That's... I'm glad to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer <username>...
If you wouldn't mind...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Would you join me on my new "hobby" again
sometime?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Only if it's not too much trouble, I mean!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin looks to be in high spirits as we
talk on the way back home.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh... I-I see...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for springing such a weird question on you
all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Uh... Please forget I asked.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Anyway... see you later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Trainer Kiryuin takes her leave, looking dejected.
